title: Create Real-Time Fraud Detection Pipeline template using fintech components
description: NEW template using fintech components: fraud-detection, payment-gateway, ml-inference, stream-processor, ledger-service. Real-time payment scoring with sub-100ms latency, ledger double-entry accounting, feedback loops for model retraining. Chaos: ML inference latency spike, stream-processor partition rebalance, ledger disk full. Difficulty: 4.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 learnSteps covering feature extraction, ML serving, ledger design, retraining
Cost breakdown with GPU inference estimates

title: Create Digital Wallet System template using fintech components
description: NEW template: payment-gateway, ledger-service, hsm, auth-service-v2. HSM-backed tokenization, EMV payment flow, PCI-DSS compliance, wallet balance consistency. Chaos: HSM failover, gateway timeout phantom holds, ledger split-brain. Difficulty: 4.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 learnSteps covering HSM, EMV, PCI-DSS, balance consistency

title: Create Crypto Exchange Order Book template using fintech components
description: NEW template: payment-gateway, ledger-service, stream-processor, event-bus. Order book matching engine, atomic balance transfers, event sourcing for audit. Chaos: matching engine crash mid-fill, event-bus consumer lag, settlement delay. Difficulty: 5.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 learnSteps covering order book, matching determinism, double-entry, event sourcing

title: Create AI Code Review Pipeline template using ai-llm components
description: NEW template: llm-gateway, agent-orchestrator, tool-registry, safety-mesh. ReAct pattern for code analysis, tool-augmented LLM agents, prompt injection defense, cost-tiered routing. Chaos: rate limit cascade, tool timeout hallucination, safety-mesh false positive. Difficulty: 4.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 learnSteps covering context chunking, ReAct agents, safety-mesh, cost routing

title: Create Multi-Modal Search Engine template using ai-llm components
description: NEW template: llm-gateway, memory-fabric, ml-inference, search-engine, feature-store. Multi-modal embeddings (CLIP), ANN vector search (HNSW), hybrid retrieval, memory-based personalization. Chaos: embedding OOM, index corruption on reindex, memory eviction storm. Difficulty: 4.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 learnSteps covering multi-modal embeddings, ANN search, hybrid retrieval, personalization

title: Create AI Customer Support Bot template using ai-llm components
description: NEW template: agent-orchestrator, llm-gateway, memory-fabric, safety-mesh, tool-registry. Intent classification, RAG over knowledge base, conversation memory, PII guardrails. Chaos: stale knowledge base, memory latency context loss, multi-turn injection bypass. Difficulty: 3.

title: Create Real-Time CDC Pipeline template using data-engineering components

title: Create Feature Engineering Platform template using data-engineering components
description: NEW template: feature-store, etl-pipeline, media-processor, ml-inference. Online vs offline serving, point-in-time correctness, feature transformation pipelines, feature reuse. Chaos: online cache miss storm, feature leakage, GPU pool exhaustion. Difficulty: 3.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 learnSteps covering online/offline serving, point-in-time, transformations, discovery

title: Create Database Replication (Leader-Follower) template using db-internals components
description: NEW template: primary-node, replica-node, coordinator-node, shard-node. WAL-based replication, consistency models, automatic failover, horizontal sharding. Chaos: primary crash data loss, split-brain, replication lag stale reads. Difficulty: 5.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 learnSteps covering WAL replication, consistency, failover, sharded replication

title: Create Distributed Consensus (Raft) template using db-internals components
description: NEW template: coordinator-node, input-node, output-node, primary-node. Raft leader election, log replication, safety guarantees, membership changes. Chaos: leader crash uncommitted entries, split vote partition, slow follower snapshot pressure. Difficulty: 5.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 learnSteps covering leader election, log replication, safety proofs, membership changes

title: Create Zero Trust Network Architecture template using security-v2 components
description: NEW template: ddos-shield, siem, service-mesh, ingress-controller, vpc. Zero trust principles, mTLS management, SIEM correlation, DDoS mitigation layers. Chaos: slowloris bypass, cert expiry cascade, SIEM alert fatigue. Difficulty: 4.
